attributes.Info: Investigative journalist known best for his "Dark Alliance" series, which argued that members of the anti-communist Contra rebels in Nicaragua, in collaborating with the CIA, contributed greatly to generating the crack coaine trade in Los Angeles in order to make money to support their efforst (San Jose Mercury News). HIs writing inspired Michael Ruppert's (theverge.com).

nodes.label: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development

attributes.Info: Missing $59 billion from their books, according to questia.com and whereisthemoney.org.
Used Barry Seal as an informant in an investigation into the government in Nicaragua and cocaine trafficking (Barry Seal Nicaragua Case).

DEA informant and CIA contract pilot who smuggled drugs, arms, laundered money, and claimed to have flown the getaway plane after Lee Harvey Oswald's assassination of President John F. Kennedy (nndb.com). "He admitted to US judges that he had flown tens of thousands of pounds of illegal drugs into the US for the government.  No wonder the CIA had him assassinated.  He even explained how he did it.  Seal owned several farms in Louisiana.  He would fly guns and ammo down to Columbia and then bring drugs back into the US.  He would fly over his farms and drop the cocaine-filled duffle bags with parachutes onto his property.  Slick huh?  Then he flew to Mena Arkansas to complete his flight. Do you think is was coincidence that the Bush brothers governed the two border states of Florida and Texas?  No way!  Where do you think the drugs are coming in?  Friend, you have no idea what is going on in this crazy world today (jesus-is-savior.com)."
Assassinated President John F. Kennedy. Oswald met Barry Seal during a joint training exercise with the Civil Air Patrol (nndb.com).

U.S. Secretary of Housing and Urban Development who lied to FBI background check investigators about payments made to his former mistress and was indicted on 18 counts of conspiracy, giving false, statements, and obstruction of justice (nydailynews.com). Named by jesus-is-savior.com as the "kingpin" involved in the $59 billion missing from the HUD program.

"If you think it is only a conspiracy theory that the CIA is trafficking massive quantities of opium and cocaine into the United States, you are dead wrong - It is a PROVEN and WELL DOCUMENTED FACT friend (jesus-is-savior.com)."
Georgia Congresswoman who defended the right of Narconews.com to freedom of speech after lawsuits were brought against the site on behalf of the National Bank of Mexico (narconews.com).
Internet news agency that reports on the drug war and democracy from all America.

"Mike used to work as an LAPD (Los Angeles Police Department) narcotics officer in the late 1970's, trained in narcotics by the US Justice Department.  The CIA tried to recruit Mike to traffic drugs with them.  When Mike tried to expose the corruption that he saw (the ONLY decent thing to do), he was fired without cause.  Mike Ruppert has spent the last 25 years fighting the system, trying to expose the lies and tyranny of the CIA (and many other offices of our government). This is no conspiracy theory, Mike Ruppert has presented over 6,000 documents indicting the US government's involvement in decades of heroin and cocaine drug-trafficking into the cities and towns of the United States [...] and has exposed the true agenda behind the 9/11 attacks (jesus-is-savior.com)."
According to drugwar.com, Bush flies in famous drug smuggler and former CIA contract pilot Barry Seal's plane.

"She has taken trips to drug-infested countries like Nicaragua to investigate and document what our own CIA is doing to fight drug trafficking into the US, absolutely nothing!   Maxine says, "There is no war on drugs going on in America today!"  She is doing everything possible to stop the CIA from further destroying south Los Angeles with tons and tons of drugs being trafficked in at an alarming rate.  This is not some nut on the internet saying these things, this is a respectable congresswoman of the United States of America!!!  And might I add, I am proud of her for taking a stand (Psalm 94:16) (jesus-is-savior.com)!"

Cited by jesus-is-savior.com as one of his favorite journalists. Jones' prisonplanet.com website was linked to when questioning why incarcerations increased by more than double while Clinton was in office, and if that was done in preparing for a police state (jesus-is-savior.com).
"Exactly the same people who run the Global Financial System run the Global Drug Trade (jesus-is-savior.com)."
Brought a lawsuit against Narconews.com on claims of economic damage.

Pardoned U.S. Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Henry Cisneros for lying to FBI background check investigators about payments made to his former mistress (nydailynews.com). "The government is looting the economy at our expense (Like the 59 billion dollars that mysteriously disappeared from the HUD program, then Clinton pardoned the HUD kingpin involved even though the man had been convicted in a court of law.    The money was never found!) (jesus-is-savior.com)"
